goal: Ask-a-Question selection cards' edges looked different from the Daily board
done: Root cause (computed-style diff): Daily slot = 6px radius + thin gold border (#e8c478 / --mt-gold-pale) → clean gold-framed rectangular card; Question slot = 16px radius + faint white border → over-rounded, no gold frame (looked oval/cropped). Both already share the same deck aspect-ratio so it wasn't an object-fit crop. Fix: gave #question-card-board + #full-board .card-slot the same border-radius:6px + gold border, and the card-back a 5px radius. Now the Ask-a-Question (and Celtic) selection cards match the Daily board edge.
verified: computed styles before: daily radius6/gold vs question radius16/white
headless render: question cards now gold-framed rectangles matching daily
